title: cyclanthera dissecta subsp. micrantha
intro: Cyclanthera dissecta subsp. micrantha, also known as the hairy calabash, is a type of plant that belongs to the Cucurbitaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cyclanthera dissecta subsp. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a valuable herbal remedy for maintaining overall health and well-being. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a supplement or used topically to treat skin conditions.
